claim_bullets.bullet_text: When working with very large collections and many operations, this can be important (raw/javascriptallonge.pdf p.253-256).
The effect is even more pronounced when we use methods like first, until, or take: (raw/javascriptallonge.pdf p.253-256).
This expression begins with a stack containing 30 elements (raw/javascriptallonge.pdf p.253-256).

source_record_text: JavaScript Allongé – A modular guide to JavaScript fundamentals and advanced techniques, focusing on lazy collection operations and their efficiency.
